nasb.text: For at the voice of the Lord Assyria will be terrified, When He strikes with the rod.

esv.text: The Assyrians will be terror-stricken at the voice of the Lord, when he strikes with his rod.

cnv.text: 亞述人必因耶和華的聲音驚惶； 耶和華要用杖擊打他們。

ccb.text: 亚述人听见耶和华的声音必心惊胆战，祂必用杖击打他们。

csbs.text: 亚述人必因耶和华的声音而丧胆， 耶和华必用杖击打他们；
